summary.fr: Étudiant en dernière année d'école d'ingénieurs à l'ESIR (diplômé en 2026), passionné par le développement full-stack et l'IA. Recherche un premier emploi (CDI) en tant que Software Engineer ou Applied AI Engineer.
summary.en: Software Engineering student graduating in 2026 specializing in full-stack web development (TypeScript, React, Next.js, SvelteKit) and applied AI (LLMs, RAG, PyTorch). Practical experience building secure cloud platforms (AWS, Docker, Keycloak) and data pipelines through internships and leadership as Student Union CTO. Eager to solve real-world system architecture, observability, and AI integration challenges under mentorship at Mistral.
